title: A Taste of Home
description: Eastmoor's taverns have run dry of remedies. Bring 2 health potions.

title: Wolf Cull
description: Wolves prowl around Brackenfen and the herds are nervous. Cull 2 of them.

title: The Long Road
description: The mayor wants word carried to Brackenfen. Visit the hamlet.

title: Empty Larders
description: Brackenfen's miners go down the shafts hungry. Bring 3 loaves of bread from the Village and the mayor will see you paid.

title: Tuskers in the Mire
description: Fed at last, the diggers won't return to the bog — boars have run wild on the trail. Cull 2 of them in Brackenfen's wilds.

title: Word to the Smithy
description: The mire road is open and the ore can flow again. Carry the news to Eastmoor's forge so the trade can be struck.
